.file-embed.background: rgb(112, 112, 112) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(153, 30, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #e7e7e7 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#e7e7e7, color-mix(in srgb, #e7e7e7 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #e7e7e7 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#e7e7e7, color-mix(in srgb, #e7e7e7 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(153, 30, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(153, 30, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(153, 30, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(193, 31, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(233, 53, 56) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(34, 30, 31) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(135, 0, 127) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgb(231, 231, 231) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgb(103, 188, 69) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(235, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(94, 169, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(235, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(235, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
